This item is called **Origin Of Time**, it provides two main benefits:

**Full Refund**: Recovers all XP and materials you invested in the character you use it on.

**Duplicate Conversion**: Only for Standard Awakeners (not for Limited in the Standard pool or the starting SR Awakeners), converts all additional copies into Standard "selectors," which can subsequently be used to obtain or duplicate other Standard Awakeners of your choice (not Limited in Standard).

This process is also applicable to **Standard Wheels** (except the Limited in the Standard pool).

It is used for re-allocating resources to build a better team.

Short term:
1. Life drain (Keyflare maxxing)
  - Main stats: 145 Keyflare 36 Amp 2 Sigil / RM
  - Substats: Keyflare >>> Aliemus = Amp > Sigil >> RM = DR > Crit rate > Crit DMG
  - Reasoning: You always want Keyflare even if your main dps gets keyflare

2. Dream of Medicine (GMurphy maxxing)
  - Main stats: 145 Keyflare 23 Crit Rate 6 Amp
  - Substats: Keyflare >> Crit rate >>> Crit DMG > Amp >> Aliemus > DR = RM = Sigil
  - Reasoning: This is investment for GMurphy and it's good on some main keyflare support or secondary keyflare support

3. April Praise (Secondary DPS set, Burster oriented)
  - Main stats: 123 Crit DMG 45 Keyflare 6 Amp
  - Substats: Crit DMG >>> Amp = Keyflare > Crit Rate > Alie > DR = RM = Sigil
  - Reasoning: This set is actually really good on setup bursters. Minimal investment grants great returns.

4. Steppenwolf filler (For DPS / Counter DPS, mostly filler)
  - Note: Minimal investments, just put best stats for the non unique set bonus

Long term:
1. Feast from Afar (Castor / Nautilus / Salvador, Defense set)
  - Main stats: 246 Sigil 15 Aliemus / Keyflare 3 Amp; or go DPS if you want Castor specific
  - Substats: Basically above
  - Reasoning: You want a good Defense set for stall comps 

2. Dream of Medicine (DPS variant)
  - Main stats: 123 Crit DMG > Crit Rate 45 Keyflare 6 Amp
  - Substats: Crit DMG > Crit Rate > Keyflare >> Alie > Amp > DR = RM = Sigil
  - Reasoning: Many DPS (and support for that matter, but support just use the GMurphy's set) want Dream, e.g Tawil

3. Further Metamorphosis (Gdoll / Tulu / Winkle / Miryam - Battery set)
  - Main stats: 145 Alie 36 Amp 2 Sigil
  - Substats: Basically above
  - Reasoning: Aliemus set super useful

4. Burial Grounds (DR)
  - Main stats: 356 DR 14 Keyflare 2 Sigil
  - Substats: DR >> Keyflare >> else
  - Reasoning: It's actually usable late game

Others: Steppenwolf (Actual decent set), Paradox (Crit DMG, teams with good batteries or long setup timer) > Crimson Pulse (Crit DMG, teams with high keyflare gen)
  - stats: Like DPS sets
  - Reasoning: Just really good DPS sets for various situations
